overview.title: Three-Portal Design
overview.subtitle: The same underlying data platform powers three very different work surfaces for three different user roles.
overview.description: The public Portal handles value communication and signup conversion. The User Dashboard handles project management and performance tracking. The Admin Dashboard handles global monitoring and operations management.

highlights.label: Public Portal
highlights.desc: Visitor entry — five-step loop animation, three-tier pricing, signup conversion

highlights.label: User Dashboard
highlights.desc: Paying customers — projects, replies, assets, analytics, and billing

highlights.label: Admin Dashboard
highlights.desc: Internal operations — task monitoring, review publishing, partner management, fraud detection

portals.title: Core Portal Design
portals.subtitle: Three portals share the same data foundation but differ in interface, functionality, and KPIs.

portals.name: Portal
kpis: Click-through rate from pricing to signup

portals.name: User Dashboard
portals.goal: Project management, reply review, performance visibility, and billing payment

portals.name: Admin Dashboard
portals.goal: Global monitoring, publishing review, billing adjustments, and partner management
kpis: Partner revenue and task completion rate
